description: Editorial club identity for Phase 4 MLS/Brasileirão priority clubs — merged into sampleData via merge-phase1-sample-data.js

flamengo.shortHistory: Flamengo are Brazil's best-supported club, with a trophy room built on Libertadores nights and domestic dominance from Rio.
flamengo.fanGuide: Expect attacking football, enormous away support, and the Fla-Flu derby against Fluminense as the emotional starting point.

palmeiras.shortHistory: Palmeiras built a modern winning machine in São Paulo, with repeated Brasileirão titles and strong Libertadores pedigree.
palmeiras.fanGuide: Green-wall atmosphere at Allianz Parque; learn the Derby Paulista against Corinthians before the state-vs-state storylines.

corinthians.shortHistory: Corinthians carry the Fiel torcida identity — working-class roots, huge crowds, and fierce Paulista derbies.
corinthians.fanGuide: Start with the Derby Paulista vs Palmeiras; the stadium roar matters as much as the tactical shape.

sao-paulo.shortHistory: São Paulo FC are a three-world-title institution in Brazilian football, known for structure, academies, and big-game pedigree.
sao-paulo.fanGuide: Tricolor Paulista identity runs deep — Morumbi nights and clássicos against Corinthians and Palmeiras anchor the learning path.

santos.shortHistory: Santos are the club of Pelé's roots and endless youth talent — the Vila Belmiro factory still defines Brazilian romance with the game.
santos.fanGuide: Peixe culture on the coast; Neymar and Gabigol stories tie the past to the present before you dive into Paulista rivals.

inter-miami.shortHistory: Inter Miami CF turned global attention toward MLS with Designated Player signings and a pink-shirt brand built in South Florida.
inter-miami.fanGuide: Chase Stadium nights mix celebrity storylines with improving squad depth — learn Messi-era context, then the Florida derby with Orlando.

lafc.shortHistory: LAFC arrived as a sleek Los Angeles expansion project and quickly became an MLS trophy contender with strong South American talent.
lafc.fanGuide: BMO Stadium atmosphere and the El Tráfico rivalry with LA Galaxy are the two names every new fan should know first.

la-galaxy.shortHistory: LA Galaxy are MLS royalty — five Cups, Hollywood appeal, and the league's original star-import blueprint.
la-galaxy.fanGuide: Carson-era history matters: Beckham, Donovan, and now a veteran mix with Marco Reus — start with El Tráfico vs LAFC.

seattle-sounders.shortHistory: Seattle Sounders FC turned Pacific Northwest passion into MLS trophies and the loudest recurring atmospheres in the league.
seattle-sounders.fanGuide: Learn the Cascadia Cup with Portland first — Lumen Field noise and green scarves are the culture before you memorize the roster.
